ValidationRule.description: PR1064302-420: Prevents users with the Plant_Admin custom permission from editing a GWB Year (Target) record when the prior status was Plant Review Complete, Published, or Locked.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.GWB_Switch__c.Bypass_VRs__c), $Permission.Plant_Admin, OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Plant Review Complete'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Published'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Locked') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to edit this Target record. Records with a status of Plant Review Complete, Published or Locked cannot be modified by a Plant Admin.
